description: DreamCLI v0.3 — Interactive prompting integration (portable prompt engine + pluggable renderer)

tasks.title: Prompt type definitions and flag schema extension
tasks.description: Define PromptConfig discriminated union (confirm, input, select, multiselect) with per-kind fields. Extend FlagSchema with optional prompt field. Add .prompt() method to FlagBuilder as metadata modifier (same pattern as .env()/.config()). Add PromptResult type for prompt engine output. No runtime behavior yet — types and schema only.

tasks.title: Prompt engine interface and built-in renderer
tasks.description: Define PromptEngine interface: promptOne(config, flagSchema) → Promise<unknown>. Implement createTerminalPrompter(stdin, stdout) as the built-in renderer using raw readline/terminal I/O. Implement createTestPrompter(answers) that returns pre-configured answers for testing. PromptEngine is the pluggable seam — users can swap renderers.

tasks.title: Integrate prompting into the resolution chain
tasks.description: Make resolve() async. Insert prompt step between config and default: for each flag with prompt config and no value yet, call promptEngine.promptOne(). Add prompter field to ResolveOptions. Non-interactive mode (no prompter or stdinIsTTY=false) skips prompts and falls through to default/required. Update all resolve() callers to await.

tasks.title: Extend RuntimeAdapter with stdin for prompt I/O
tasks.description: Add stdin (ReadableStream or readline interface) and stdinIsTTY fields to RuntimeAdapter. Update createNodeAdapter to source from process.stdin. Update createTestAdapter with configurable stdin mock. Wire stdinIsTTY through CLIBuilder.run() to resolve options for prompt gating.

tasks.title: Command-level .interactive() API and schema-driven prompt resolution
tasks.description: Add .interactive(resolver) method to CommandBuilder per PRD API: receives partially resolved values, returns prompt schema for missing values. Add interactive field to CommandSchema. The resolver function is called after CLI/env/config resolution but before prompts fire — it decides which prompts to show based on current state. Commands without .interactive() use per-flag prompt configs directly.

tasks.title: Wire prompting through testkit and CLI builder
tasks.description: Add answers/prompter field to RunOptions for test injection. Update runCommand() pipeline to create test prompter from answers or accept explicit prompter. Update CLIBuilder.execute() and .run() to thread prompter through resolution. Add help text annotation for promptable flags. Ensure all existing 599+ tests pass.
